title: Rustins Blackboard Black Paint 250ml
features: Versatile Chalkboard Creation: Transform any surface into a chalk-friendly canvas with Rustins Blackboard Black Paint, ideal for home, office, or classroom use.
Smooth and Durable Finish: Our premium formula ensures a smooth, durable blackboard surface that stands up to regular use, creating a long-lasting space for your creativity to flourish.

Easy Application for Instant Creativity: Apply with ease and let your imagination flow. Rustins Blackboard Black Paint is designed for hassle-free application. ADD TO CART now for your creative haven.
Fade-Resistant Brilliance: Enjoy vibrant and fade-resistant blackboard brilliance, ensuring your creations stand out and remain vivid over time.
Endless Possibilities: From to-do lists to artistic masterpieces, this blackboard paint unlocks endless possibilities, making it a must-have for both functional and decorative spaces.
description: From the manufacturer Quick Dry Blackboard Black Blackboard Black provides a matt black non-reflective surface for blackboards and photographic work. Create a chalkboard on almost any surface. Suitable for interior and exterior use. Clean brushes in water. Fe atures Matt black, non reflective Water based & quick drying Can be used Blackboards Notice boards Photographic work About Rustins I n 1924 Sidney Rustin opened his first shop in London's Shoreditch district where he sold wood finishing products to local residents and trades people. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the best brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. Rustins products sell throughout the UK to home DIY enthusiasts and professionals who want quality and innovative products.
